Job Position: Digital Marketer

Job Location: Benin City, Edo
Job Type: Full-time

Key Requirements


	Minimum of an OND qualification in Marketing, Mass Communication or related disciplines
	Understanding of SEO and SEM principles.
	Experience with email marketing and customer engagement strategies.
	Strong knowledge of social media marketing (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, X, etc.)
	Ability to generate leads and drive online engagement.
	Strong communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills.
	Knowledge of paid advertising and campaign management.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and digital marketing tools.
	Applicants must reside in Benin City.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 per month (subject to experience and competence).

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to: Extramileageconsults1@gmail.com using &quot;DIGITAL MARKETERS&quot; as the subject of the email.

Digital Marketer Job at Extramileage Consults Limited




        
    

        
        Extramileage Consults Limited - Our client, a real estate development firm, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketer

Job Location: Benin City, Edo
Job Type: Full-time

Key Requirements
     

            
    




	Minimum of an OND qualification in Marketing, Mass Communication or related disciplines
	Understanding of SEO and SEM principles.
	Experience with email marketing and customer engagement strategies.
	Strong knowledge of social media marketing (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, X, etc.)
	Ability to generate leads and drive online engagement.
	Strong communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills.
	Knowledge of paid advertising and campaign management.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and digital marketing tools.
	Applicants must reside in Benin City.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 per month (subject to experience and competence).

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CVs to: [email protected] using "DIGITAL MARKETERS" as the subject of the email.

Note: For more enquiries: Whatsapp 09135200982.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Social Media Manager Job at the Vault Recruitment (TVR)
content:
The Vault Recruitment (TVR) is a fast growing recruitment firm specializing in connecting top talent with SME's and Startup organizations. Our team of experienced recruiters understands the unique needs and challenges of the modern job market and uses our extensive network and industry knowledge to find the best candidates for our clients.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager

Vacancy Code: BOA002
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type:

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are seeking a creative and results-driven Social Media Manager to oversee our social media presence, create engaging content, grow our online community, and drive brand awareness across various digital platforms.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement social media strategies to increase brand visibility and engagement.
	Create, schedule, and publish content across social media platforms, including Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, and X (Twitter).
	Monitor social media trends and recommend innovative content ideas.
	Respond to comments, messages, and customer inquiries promptly.
	Track, analyze, and report social media performance metrics.
	Collaborate with the marketing and sales teams to support campaigns and promotions.
	Manage social media advertising campaigns when required.
	Maintain a consistent brand voice across all platforms.


Requirements


	Minimum of OND / HND / Bachelor's Degree in Marketing,  Communications, Mass  Communication, or related field.
	Proven experience managing social media accounts for a business or brand.
	Strong content creation and copywriting skills.
	Basic graphic design skills using tools such as Canva or Adobe Creative Suite.
	Knowledge of social media analytics and scheduling tools.
	Excellent  communication and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines.


Salary
N80,000 / month.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Customer Care Executive Job at the Vault Recruitment (TVR)
content:
The Vault Recruitment (TVR) is a fast growing recruitment firm specializing in connecting top talent with SME's and Startup organizations. Our team of experienced recruiters understands the unique needs and challenges of the modern job market and uses our extensive network and industry knowledge to find the best candidates for our clients.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Care Executive

Vacancy Code: PROF010
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full - Time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are seeking a smart, organized, and proactive Customer care Executive to oversee daily customer and administrative responsibilities.
	The ideal candidate should possess excellent organizational, communication, and multitasking skills, with the ability to maintain professionalism in a fast-paced work environment.


Requirements


	Minimum of HND / BSc Degree
	Minimum of 1 year of experience
	Previous administrative experience is an added advantage
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools (Word, Excel, Outlook, etc.)
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to multitask and work independently
	Professional appearance and positive attitude
	Gender: Females only (For Gender balance purposes)
	Must be reliable, detail-oriented, and proactive.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Operations and Supply Chain Manager",
  "description": "Dicalo Consulting Group - Our client is&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Operations and Supply Chain Manager

Job Location: Lagos

Role Summary&nbsp;


	Our client is seeking a highly strategic, detail-oriented, and execution-driven Operations &amp; Supply Chain Manager to oversee and optimize the company&rsquo;s end-to-end operational and supply chain activities across retail, e-commerce, warehousing, procurement, fulfillment, and distribution channels.
	The ideal candidate will play a critical role in ensuring operational efficiency, inventory availability, cost optimization, demand planning, and seamless coordination between departments to support the company&rsquo;s aggressive growth and expansion objectives.
	This role requires a strong leader with experience in FMCG, beauty, skincare, retail, e&shy;commerce, or consumer goods environments, with the ability to manage both strategic planning and day-to-day execution.


Key Responsibilities
Supply Chain Management:


	Oversee the end-to-end supply chain process including procurement, inventory management, warehousing, fulfillment, and logistics.
	Develop and implement supply chain strategies to improve operational efficiency and reduce costs.
	Monitor supplier performance and ensure timely procurement and delivery of goods.
	Manage relationships with manufacturers, suppliers, logistics providers, and third-party partners.
	Identify and mitigate supply chain risks and operational bottlenecks.


Inventory &amp; Warehouse Management:


	Ensure optimal inventory levels across stores, warehouses, and fulfillment centers.
	Monitor stock movement, replenishment cycles, and inventory forecasting.
	Implement inventory control systems to minimize stock discrepancies, wastage, and stockouts.
	Coordinate regular stock counts, audits, and reconciliations.
	Ensure warehouse operations comply with operational, safety, and quality standards.


Fulfillment &amp; Logistics:


	Oversee order fulfillment processes across retail and e-commerce channels.
	Ensure timely and accurate dispatch and delivery of customer orders.
	Monitor logistics performance metrics including delivery timelines, order accuracy, and customer satisfaction.
	Develop strategies to improve delivery efficiency and reduce logistics costs.
	Coordinate with customer service teams on fulfillment-related escalations.


Operations Management:


	Drive operational excellence across all operational touchpoints within the business.
	Develop and implement SOPs, operational frameworks, and process improvements.
	Ensure effective coordination between Sales, Marketing, Finance, Customer Service, and Inventory teams.
	Monitor operational KPIs and prepare periodic operational performance reports.
	Support expansion initiatives including new stores, stockist onboarding, and regional expansion projects.


Demand Planning &amp; Forecasting:


	Collaborate with Sales and Marketing teams to forecast demand and align inventory planning accordingly.
	Analyze sales trends, historical data, and market insights to improve forecasting accuracy.
	Ensure inventory investment aligns with projected sales and business objectives.


Procurement &amp; Vendor Management:


	Lead procurement planning and supplier negotiations.
	Evaluate vendors based on quality, pricing, timelines, and reliability.
	Ensure procurement processes align with company budgets and operational goals.
	Identify alternative sourcing opportunities to reduce dependency risks.


Performance Management &amp; Reporting:


	Develop and track operational KPIs across departments.
	Prepare weekly, monthly, and quarterly operational reports for management review.
	Monitor team productivity, operational efficiency, and execution timelines.
	Ensure accountability and performance discipline across operations teams.


Compliance &amp; Risk Management:


	Ensure compliance with internal operational policies and regulatory requirements.
	Implement controls to safeguard company inventory, assets, and operational data.
	Monitor operational risks and develop mitigation strategies.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)
The Operations &amp; Supply Chain Manager will be measured on:


	Inventory availability rate
	Stock accuracy and reconciliation
	Order fulfillment turnaround time
	Logistics and operational cost efficiency
	Supplier performance and procurement timelines
	Warehouse efficiency
	Reduction in stockouts and operational losses
	Execution of operational projects and timelines


Requirements
Qualifications &amp; Experience:


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Supply Chain Management, Operations Management, Business Administration, Logistics, or related field.
	Professional certifications such as:
	
		APICS
		CIPS
		PMP
		Lean Six Sigma arean added advantage.
	
	
	5&ndash;8 years of experience in operations and supply chain management.
	Prior experience within:
	
		FMCG
		Beauty &amp; Skincare
		Retail
		E-commerce
		Consumer Goods environments are highly preferred.
	
	
	Proven experience managing warehouse, procurement, fulfillment, and logistics operations.


Required Skills &amp; Competencies:


	Strong operational and analytical thinking.
	Supply chain planning and inventory management expertise.
	Strong leadership and team management skills.
	Excellent negotiation and vendor management capability.
	Strong reporting and data analysis skills.
	High attention to detail and accountability.
	Problem-solving and execution ability.
	Excellent communication and stakeholder management.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: cynthiaasogwa@dicaloo.com using the&nbsp;&nbsp;Job Position as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-07-04",
  "validThrough": "2026-08-01",

Operations and Supply Chain Manager Job at Dicalo Consulting Group




        
    

        
        Dicalo Consulting Group - Our client is  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Operations and Supply Chain Manager

Job Location: Lagos

Role Summary 
     

            
    




	Our client is seeking a highly strategic, detail-oriented, and execution-driven Operations & Supply Chain Manager to oversee and optimize the company’s end-to-end operational and supply chain activities across retail, e-commerce, warehousing, procurement, fulfillment, and distribution channels.
	The ideal candidate will play a critical role in ensuring operational efficiency, inventory availability, cost optimization, demand planning, and seamless coordination between departments to support the company’s aggressive growth and expansion objectives.
	This role requires a strong leader with experience in FMCG, beauty, skincare, retail, e­commerce, or consumer goods environments, with the ability to manage both strategic planning and day-to-day execution.


Key Responsibilities
Supply Chain Management:


	Oversee the end-to-end supply chain process including procurement, inventory management, warehousing, fulfillment, and logistics.
	Develop and implement supply chain strategies to improve operational efficiency and reduce costs.
	Monitor supplier performance and ensure timely procurement and delivery of goods.
	Manage relationships with manufacturers, suppliers, logistics providers, and third-party partners.
	Identify and mitigate supply chain risks and operational bottlenecks.


Inventory & Warehouse Management:


	Ensure optimal inventory levels across stores, warehouses, and fulfillment centers.
	Monitor stock movement, replenishment cycles, and inventory forecasting.
	Implement inventory control systems to minimize stock discrepancies, wastage, and stockouts.
	Coordinate regular stock counts, audits, and reconciliations.
	Ensure warehouse operations comply with operational, safety, and quality standards.


Fulfillment & Logistics:


	Oversee order fulfillment processes across retail and e-commerce channels.
	Ensure timely and accurate dispatch and delivery of customer orders.
	Monitor logistics performance metrics including delivery timelines, order accuracy, and customer satisfaction.
	Develop strategies to improve delivery efficiency and reduce logistics costs.
	Coordinate with customer service teams on fulfillment-related escalations.


Operations Management:


	Drive operational excellence across all operational touchpoints within the business.
	Develop and implement SOPs, operational frameworks, and process improvements.
	Ensure effective coordination between Sales, Marketing, Finance, Customer Service, and Inventory teams.
	Monitor operational KPIs and prepare periodic operational performance reports.
	Support expansion initiatives including new stores, stockist onboarding, and regional expansion projects.


Demand Planning & Forecasting:


	Collaborate with Sales and Marketing teams to forecast demand and align inventory planning accordingly.
	Analyze sales trends, historical data, and market insights to improve forecasting accuracy.
	Ensure inventory investment aligns with projected sales and business objectives.


Procurement & Vendor Management:


	Lead procurement planning and supplier negotiations.
	Evaluate vendors based on quality, pricing, timelines, and reliability.
	Ensure procurement processes align with company budgets and operational goals.
	Identify alternative sourcing opportunities to reduce dependency risks.


Performance Management & Reporting:


	Develop and track operational KPIs across departments.
	Prepare weekly, monthly, and quarterly operational reports for management review.
	Monitor team productivity, operational efficiency, and execution timelines.
	Ensure accountability and performance discipline across operations teams.


Compliance & Risk Management:


	Ensure compliance with internal operational policies and regulatory requirements.
	Implement controls to safeguard company inventory, assets, and operational data.
	Monitor operational risks and develop mitigation strategies.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)
The Operations & Supply Chain Manager will be measured on:


	Inventory availability rate
	Stock accuracy and reconciliation
	Order fulfillment turnaround time
	Logistics and operational cost efficiency
	Supplier performance and procurement timelines
	Warehouse efficiency
	Reduction in stockouts and operational losses
	Execution of operational projects and timelines


Requirements
Qualifications & Experience:


	Bachelor’s Degree in Supply Chain Management, Operations Management, Business Administration, Logistics, or related field.
	Professional certifications such as:
	
		APICS
		CIPS
		PMP
		Lean Six Sigma arean added advantage.
	
	
	5–8 years of experience in operations and supply chain management.
	Prior experience within:
	
		FMCG
		Beauty & Skincare
		Retail
		E-commerce
		Consumer Goods environments are highly preferred.
	
	
	Proven experience managing warehouse, procurement, fulfillment, and logistics operations.


Required Skills & Competencies:


	Strong operational and analytical thinking.
	Supply chain planning and inventory management expertise.
	Strong leadership and team management skills.
	Excellent negotiation and vendor management capability.
	Strong reporting and data analysis skills.
	High attention to detail and accountability.
	Problem-solving and execution ability.
	Excellent communication and stakeholder management.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the  Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Deen Consult is a dynamic professional services firm specializing in Recruitment, Training, and General Business Consultation. Established with a passion for helping organizations achieve sustainable growth, we serve as a trusted partner to businesses across diverse industries. Our mission is to bridge the gap between talent, knowledge, and performance, ensuring that our clients remain competitive in today&rsquo;s fast-changing business environment.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Production Manager

Job Location: Lagos

Role Description


	The Production Manager will oversee daily production operations, manage production schedules, ensure product quality standards, and coordinate with various departments to maintain efficiency.


Responsibilities


	Key responsibilities include monitoring inventory levels, supervising the production team, and implementing safety protocols.


Qualifications


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Food Science and Tech, Engineering, Manufacturing, or related fields
	5 - 15 years of hands on experience in a manufacturing environment.
	Experience in production management, manufacturing processes, and quality control
	Strong organizational, planning, and problem-solving skills
	Excellent leadership and team management abilities
	Knowledge of safety and health regulations in manufacturing
	Strong communication skills and ability to work collaboratively
	Familiarity with food production standards and compliance is a plus
	Proficiency in production management software is an advantage.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: deenconsult@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Production Manager Job at Deen Consult




        
    

        
        Deen Consult is a dynamic professional services firm specializing in Recruitment, Training, and General Business Consultation. Established with a passion for helping organizations achieve sustainable growth, we serve as a trusted partner to businesses across diverse industries. Our mission is to bridge the gap between talent, knowledge, and performance, ensuring that our clients remain competitive in today’s fast-changing business environment.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Production Manager

Job Location: Lagos

Role Description
     

            
    




	The Production Manager will oversee daily production operations, manage production schedules, ensure product quality standards, and coordinate with various departments to maintain efficiency.


Responsibilities


	Key responsibilities include monitoring inventory levels, supervising the production team, and implementing safety protocols.


Qualifications


	Bachelor's Degree in Food Science and Tech, Engineering, Manufacturing, or related fields
	5 - 15 years of hands on experience in a manufacturing environment.
	Experience in production management, manufacturing processes, and quality control
	Strong organizational, planning, and problem-solving skills
	Excellent leadership and team management abilities
	Knowledge of safety and health regulations in manufacturing
	Strong communication skills and ability to work collaboratively
	Familiarity with food production standards and compliance is a plus
	Proficiency in production management software is an advantage.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
